title: YDM's Gourmets
description: More dishes for your survival game
body:
This mod will add more dishes for your survival game.

A mod that will let you eat the eggs.

#### 8 new food item:

- Put an egg on the crafting grid and get a hard boiled egg

- Put an egg on the furnace and get a fried egg

- Combine an egg and a bowl to get scrambled egg

- Combine milk and rotten flesh to make cheese

- Combine cheese, a pork chop, and an egg to get a ham and cheese omelette

- Combine scrambled egg and mushroom to get mushroom omelette

- Combine a fried egg and a bread to get egg sandwich

- Combine wheat, egg, and mushroom to get quiche

 

Suggested by: EmeraldDragon007 (minecraftforum.net)
